name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the platform
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug, needs triage'
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Please indicate whether it occurs in the frontend (Angular) or backend (.NET API).

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain your problem.

## Environment (please complete the following information):
 - OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge]
 - Version: [e.g. 22]
 - Application Component: [e.g., Portfolio.UI, Portfolio.API]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here, such as relevant logs from the browser console or the backend terminal.
